title: 7 Signs a Godly Man Is Still Three Different Guys
caption:
7 signs a godly man is still three different guys.

The version of you at church and the version of you in the group chat. What you say about him online and what you'd say to his face. If the sentence changes when he's not in the room, it wasn't true to begin with.

Matthew 5:37 doesn't ask for eloquence. It asks for a yes that stays a yes. A man's word is either load-bearing or it isn't, and the group chat finds out eventually.

God isn't grading the performance. He already read the prayer you actually meant.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #manofgod #character #realtalk
